TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: 2026 a mihcaan aw-lin pi-ke kasienewan miundukay a malingatu tu2026 2026 a mihcaan aw-lin pi-ke kasienewan miundukay a malingatu tu i tiniay a tuki 2026 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 6 a demiad u nikasasudang a tuki 19: katukuh 23 29 a tuki malingatu .2026 19:00)Ťá≥23:29ŤąČŤ°Ć.kalingatuwana kitidaan i yi-ta-li mi-lan-sen-si-lu akitidaan nu kakadubaan , ,ayda amihca sakadademec atu duma mumukuay tinakawaw ci liwiyniya , pulaytacu , atu ci ke-ti-na-tay-pi-su malecad a mikawaw tu sakalingatu ; tina aydaay a nikalingatu nu piundukay sayaway mikawaay a kanatal sie a kitidaan malaedad a malingatu tu aydaay a kasienawan u yi-ta-li nu cung-tung ci sayl-ciyaw. Ma-ta-lay-la mihapiyu malingatu . .Wiyni sa nu kanatal aw-li-pi-ku nu eiyyunhuy a cu-si ci ke-se-ti. Ke-hun-tu-li u sitatudungay henay a miwanay tina sayaway nu kasienawan a piundukay , u aw-huy kumilingatuay . .aydaay anikadademec sa likeluh sa nu 1956 amihcaan nu ke-ti-na-tay-pi-su nu kasienawan a nipikadademec 70 a mihcaan ku laad , i 2006 amihcaan sa matumes 20 a mihcaan nu lisin , 20ŚĎ®ŚĻī,atu nu yi-ta-lipulunga kanatal napatudeng 80 a mihcaan . .palasul tu kawawśļĖŚāôŚ∑•šĹúkalingatuwan sitatudungay a kitidaan i sen-si-lu a kadadubaan kalingatuwan u ci mal-ke.pa-li-ci (Marco Balich)ku situngusay ,ťĖčŚĻēŚľŹÁĒĪť¶¨ÁąĺÁßĎ¬∑Ś∑īŚą©Ś•á(Marco Balich)Śü∑Śįé,u Banijay Live ku situngusay u Balich Wonder Studio ku mikawaay .ÁĒĪBanijay LiveśóóšłčBalich Wonder StudiośČŅŚą∂.kalingatuwan i mi-lan u tatengaay a kitidaan sa i sec-si-lu a mammalian , ke-ti-tay-wiy-pi-su atu duma tu a kitidaan a madademawc tu sikawaay ; :li-wiy-ni atu bu-lay-ta-cu malecad a mikawaw patapabaw tu pahatay atu milihidaay a miundukayay maladay amin a micumud i aundukayayn , ,misiteked tu aydaay a nikadademec ;milan, ke-ti-na-tay-pi-su-hun patideng tusa ku sapalikat tu lamal , ,ina tusaay a aw-li-pi-ke a dadubaan naemekan u sayaway tina tu a kitidaan u cayay kalecad a tukay patideng tu sapalamal . .aydaay a nikalingatu u milihidaan nu mipaliway a misakakawaway 1200 ku tademaw milihidaay a misalukiyaw , ,micukaymas malakuwit 1400 ku dikuc; milihidaay misalikiyaw 700 a tatukian a minanam . u salukiyaway yu minanam700 a tatukian minanam , ya se-si-lu a mamaliyan u tayniay a labang 61000 ku tayniay miadih , 61000ŚźćŤßÄÁúĺ,u sapicumud a paya u kalisiw makaala tu 2300 nu amilika a kalisiw anu sanu zen-min-pi ku sausi sa makaala tu 1.6 a emang . .nikalingatu u aw-li-pi-ke pahusuay a kusi ku musulutay misanga , ,sipakayni nu kanatal a aw-li-pi-ke wiyyunhuy pakasitungusay a patahekal pahusu tatacuwa a patahekal . .
S.PHON: **** a mińß ¶aan aw-r~…ĺin pi-k…ô kasi…ôn…ôwan miundukaj a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu**** **** a mińß ¶aan aw-r~…ĺin pi-k…ô kasi…ôn…ôwan miundukaj a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu i tiniaj a tuki **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad u nikasasudaŇč a tuki **: katukuńß ** ** a tuki mar~…ĺiŇčatu .**** **:**)***:****.kar~…ĺiŇčatuwana kitidaan i ji-ta-r~…ĺi mi-r~…ĺan-s…ôn-si-r~…ĺu akitidaan nu kakadubaan , ,ajda amińß ¶a sakadad…ôm…ô ¶ atu duma mumukuaj tinakawaw ¶i r~…ĺiwijnija , pur~…ĺajta ¶u , atu ¶i k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-su mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mikawaw tu sakar~…ĺiŇčatu ; tina ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺiŇčatu nu piundukaj sajawaj mikawaaj a kanatar~…ĺ si…ô a kitidaan mar~…ĺa…ôdad a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ajdaaj a kasi…ônawan u ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i sajr~…ĺ- ¶ijaw. ma-ta-r~…ĺaj-r~…ĺa mińßapiju mar~…ĺiŇčatu . .wijni sa nu kanatar~…ĺ aw-r~…ĺi-pi-ku nu …ôijjunńßuj a ¶u-si ¶i k…ô-s…ô-ti. k…ô-ńßun-tu-r~…ĺi u sitatuduŇčaj ńß…ônaj a miwanaj tina sajawaj nu kasi…ônawan a piundukaj , u aw-ńßuj kumir~…ĺiŇčatuaj . .ajdaaj anikadad…ôm…ô ¶ sa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß sa nu **** amińß ¶aan nu k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-su nu kasi…ônawan a nipikadad…ôm…ô ¶ ** a mińß ¶aan ku r~…ĺaad , i **** amińß ¶aan sa matum…ôs ** a mińß ¶aan nu r~…ĺisin , ****,atu nu ji-ta-r~…ĺipur~…ĺuŇča kanatar~…ĺ napatud…ôŇč ** a mińß ¶aan . .par~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu kawaw****kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan sitatuduŇčaj a kitidaan i s…ôn-si-r~…ĺu a kadadubaan kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan u ¶i mar~…ĺ-k…ô.pa-r~…ĺi- ¶i (mar ¶o bar~…ĺi ¶ńß)ku situŇčusaj ,***********(mar ¶o bar~…ĺi ¶ńß)**,u banijaj r~…ĺi*…ô ku situŇčusaj u bar~…ĺi ¶ńß wond…ôr studio ku mikawaaj .*banijaj r~…ĺi*…ô**bar~…ĺi ¶ńß wond…ôr studio**.kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan i mi-r~…ĺan u tat…ôŇčaaj a kitidaan sa i s…ô ¶-si-r~…ĺu a mammar~…ĺian , k…ô-ti-taj-wij-pi-su atu duma tu a kitidaan a madad…ômaw ¶ tu sikawaaj ; :r~…ĺi-wij-ni atu bu-r~…ĺaj-ta- ¶u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mikawaw patapabaw tu pańßataj atu mir~…ĺińßidaaj a miundukajaj mar~…ĺadaj amin a mi ¶umud i aundukajajn , ,misit…ôk…ôd tu ajdaaj a nikadad…ôm…ô ¶ ;mir~…ĺan, k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-su-ńßun patid…ôŇč tusa ku sapar~…ĺikat tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ , ,ina tusaaj a aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô a dadubaan na…ôm…ôkan u sajawaj tina tu a kitidaan u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a tukaj patid…ôŇč tu sapar~…ĺamar~…ĺ . .ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺiŇčatu u mir~…ĺińßidaan nu mipar~…ĺiwaj a misakakawawaj **** ku tad…ômaw mir~…ĺińßidaaj a misar~…ĺukijaw , ,mi ¶ukajmas mar~…ĺakuwit **** ku diku ¶; mir~…ĺińßidaaj misar~…ĺikijaw *** a tatukian a minanam . u sar~…ĺukijawaj ju minanam*** a tatukian minanam , ja s…ô-si-r~…ĺu a mamar~…ĺijan u tajniaj a r~…ĺabaŇč ***** ku tajniaj miadińß , ********,u sapi ¶umud a paja u kar~…ĺisiw makaar~…ĺa tu **** nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw anu sanu z…ôn-min-pi ku sausi sa makaar~…ĺa tu *.* a …ômaŇč . .nikar~…ĺiŇčatu u aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô pańßusuaj a kusi ku musur~…ĺutaj misaŇča , ,sipakajni nu kanatar~…ĺ a aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô wijjunńßuj pakasituŇčusaj a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ pańßusu tata ¶uwa a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ . .
S.FORM: 2026 a mihcaan aw-lin pi-ke kasienewan miundukay a malingatu tu2026 2026 a mihcaan aw-lin pi-ke kasienewan miundukay a malingatu tu i tiniay a tuki 2026 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 6 a demiad u nikasasudang a tuki 19: katukuh 23 29 a tuki malingatu .2026 19:00)Ťá≥23:29ŤąČŤ°Ć.kalingatuwana kitidaan i yi-ta-li mi-lan-sen-si-lu akitidaan nu kakadubaan , ,ayda amihca sakadademec atu duma mumukuay tinakawaw ci liwiyniya , pulaytacu , atu ci ke-ti-na-tay-pi-su malecad a mikawaw tu sakalingatu ; tina aydaay a nikalingatu nu piundukay sayaway mikawaay a kanatal sie a kitidaan malaedad a malingatu tu aydaay a kasienawan u yi-ta-li nu cung-tung ci sayl-ciyaw. Ma-ta-lay-la mihapiyu malingatu . .Wiyni sa nu kanatal aw-li-pi-ku nu eiyyunhuy a cu-si ci ke-se-ti. Ke-hun-tu-li u sitatudungay henay a miwanay tina sayaway nu kasienawan a piundukay , u aw-huy kumilingatuay . .aydaay anikadademec sa likeluh sa nu 1956 amihcaan nu ke-ti-na-tay-pi-su nu kasienawan a nipikadademec 70 a mihcaan ku laad , i 2006 amihcaan sa matumes 20 a mihcaan nu lisin , 20ŚĎ®ŚĻī,atu nu yi-ta-lipulunga kanatal napatudeng 80 a mihcaan . .palasul tu kawawśļĖŚāôŚ∑•šĹúkalingatuwan sitatudungay a kitidaan i sen-si-lu a kadadubaan kalingatuwan u ci mal-ke.pa-li-ci (Marco Balich)ku situngusay ,ťĖčŚĻēŚľŹÁĒĪť¶¨ÁąĺÁßĎ¬∑Ś∑īŚą©Ś•á(Marco Balich)Śü∑Śįé,u Banijay Live ku situngusay u Balich Wonder Studio ku mikawaay .ÁĒĪBanijay LiveśóóšłčBalich Wonder StudiośČŅŚą∂.kalingatuwan i mi-lan u tatengaay a kitidaan sa i sec-si-lu a mammalian , ke-ti-tay-wiy-pi-su atu duma tu a kitidaan a madademawc tu sikawaay ; :li-wiy-ni atu bu-lay-ta-cu malecad a mikawaw patapabaw tu pahatay atu milihidaay a miundukayay maladay amin a micumud i aundukayayn , ,misiteked tu aydaay a nikadademec ;milan, ke-ti-na-tay-pi-su-hun patideng tusa ku sapalikat tu lamal , ,ina tusaay a aw-li-pi-ke a dadubaan naemekan u sayaway tina tu a kitidaan u cayay kalecad a tukay patideng tu sapalamal . .aydaay a nikalingatu u milihidaan nu mipaliway a misakakawaway 1200 ku tademaw milihidaay a misalukiyaw , ,micukaymas malakuwit 1400 ku dikuc; milihidaay misalikiyaw 700 a tatukian a minanam . u salukiyaway yu minanam700 a tatukian minanam , ya se-si-lu a mamaliyan u tayniay a labang 61000 ku tayniay miadih , 61000ŚźćŤßÄÁúĺ,u sapicumud a paya u kalisiw makaala tu 2300 nu amilika a kalisiw anu sanu zen-min-pi ku sausi sa makaala tu 1.6 a emang . .nikalingatu u aw-li-pi-ke pahusuay a kusi ku musulutay misanga , ,sipakayni nu kanatal a aw-li-pi-ke wiyyunhuy pakasitungusay a patahekal pahusu tatacuwa a patahekal . .

tina ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺiŇčatu nu piundukaj sajawaj mikawaaj a kanatar~…ĺ si…ô a kitidaan mar~…ĺa…ôdad a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ajdaaj a kasi…ônawan u ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i sajr~…ĺ- ¶ijaw. ma-ta-r~…ĺaj-r~…ĺa mińßapiju mar~…ĺiŇčatu . .wijni sa nu kanatar~…ĺ aw-r~…ĺi-pi-ku nu …ôijjunńßuj a ¶u-si ¶i k…ô-s…ô-ti. k…ô-ńßun-tu-r~…ĺi u sitatuduŇčaj ńß…ônaj a miwanaj tina sajawaj nu kasi…ônawan a piundukaj , u aw-ńßuj kumir~…ĺiŇčatuaj . .ajdaaj anikadad…ôm…ô ¶ sa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß sa nu **** amińß ¶aan nu k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-su nu kasi…ônawan a nipikadad…ôm…ô ¶ ** a mińß ¶aan ku r~…ĺaad , i **** amińß ¶aan sa matum…ôs ** a mińß ¶aan nu r~…ĺisin , ****,atu nu ji-ta-r~…ĺipur~…ĺuŇča kanatar~…ĺ napatud…ôŇč ** a mińß ¶aan . .par~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu kawaw****kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan sitatuduŇčaj a kitidaan i s…ôn-si-r~…ĺu a kadadubaan kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan u ¶i mar~…ĺ-k…ô.pa-r~…ĺi- ¶i (mar ¶o bar~…ĺi ¶ńß)ku situŇčusaj ,***********(mar ¶o bar~…ĺi ¶ńß)**,u banijaj r~…ĺi*…ô ku situŇčusaj u bar~…ĺi ¶ńß wond…ôr studio ku mikawaaj .*banijaj r~…ĺi*…ô**bar~…ĺi ¶ńß wond…ôr studio**.kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan i mi-r~…ĺan u tat…ôŇčaaj a kitidaan sa i s…ô ¶-si-r~…ĺu a mammar~…ĺian , k…ô-ti-taj-wij-pi-su atu duma tu a kitidaan a madad…ômaw ¶ tu sikawaaj ; :r~…ĺi-wij-ni atu bu-r~…ĺaj-ta- ¶u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mikawaw patapabaw tu pańßataj atu mir~…ĺińßidaaj a miundukajaj mar~…ĺadaj amin a mi ¶umud i aundukajajn , ,misit…ôk…ôd tu ajdaaj a nikadad…ôm…ô ¶ ;mir~…ĺan, k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-su-ńßun patid…ôŇč tusa ku sapar~…ĺikat tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ , ,ina tusaaj a aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô a dadubaan na…ôm…ôkan u sajawaj tina tu a kitidaan u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a tukaj patid…ôŇč tu sapar~…ĺamar~…ĺ . .ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺiŇčatu u mir~…ĺińßidaan nu mipar~…ĺiwaj a misakakawawaj **** ku tad…ômaw mir~…ĺińßidaaj a misar~…ĺukijaw , ,mi ¶ukajmas mar~…ĺakuwit **** ku diku ¶; mir~…ĺińßidaaj misar~…ĺikijaw *** a tatukian a minanam . u sar~…ĺukijawaj ju minanam*** a tatukian minanam , ja s…ô-si-r~…ĺu a mamar~…ĺijan u tajniaj a r~…ĺabaŇč ***** ku tajniaj miadińß , ********,u sapi ¶umud a paja u kar~…ĺisiw makaar~…ĺa tu **** nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw anu sanu z…ôn-min-pi ku sausi sa makaar~…ĺa tu *.* a …ômaŇč . .nikar~…ĺiŇčatu u aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô pańßusuaj a kusi ku musur~…ĺutaj misaŇča , ,sipakajni nu kanatar~…ĺ a aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô wijjunńßuj pakasituŇčusaj a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ pańßusu tata ¶uwa a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ . .
